source_text: I see the description of Mr. Chalo setting fire to a mattress and attacking officers, which immediately raises questions about physical safety [2.1]. His prior robbery and repeated conflicts mark a history consistent with serious wrongdoing [2.7]. I also note his self-injury and lack of treatment, which makes me consider the ethical priority of mental health care over simple containment [5.3].
translation: Je vois la description de M. Chalo mettant le feu à un matelas et attaquant des agents, ce qui soulève immédiatement des questions concernant la sécurité physique [2.1]. Son vol antérieur et ses conflits répétés marquent un historique cohérent avec des fautes graves [2.7]. Je note également son automutilation et l'absence de traitement, ce qui m'amène à considérer la priorité éthique des soins de santé mentale sur le simple confinement [5.3].

source_text: I see the description of Mr. Chalo setting fire to a mattress and attacking officers, which immediately raises questions about physical safety [2.1]. His prior robbery and repeated conflicts mark a history consistent with serious wrongdoing [2.7]. I also note his self-injury and lack of treatment, which makes me consider the ethical priority of mental health care over simple containment [5.3].
translation: Vedo la descrizione del Sig. Chalo che appicca il fuoco a un materasso e aggredisce gli agenti, il che solleva immediatamente questioni sulla sicurezza fisica [2.1]. La sua precedente rapina e i ripetuti conflitti delineano una storia coerente con gravi illeciti [2.7]. Noto inoltre l'autolesionismo e la mancanza di cure, il che mi porta a considerare la priorità etica dell'assistenza alla salute mentale rispetto al semplice contenimento [5.3].

source_text: I see the description of Mr. Chalo setting fire to a mattress and attacking officers, which immediately raises questions about physical safety [2.1]. His prior robbery and repeated conflicts mark a history consistent with serious wrongdoing [2.7]. I also note his self-injury and lack of treatment, which makes me consider the ethical priority of mental health care over simple containment [5.3].
translation: Я вижу описание того, как господин Чало поджег матрас и напал на сотрудников, что немедленно вызывает вопросы о физической безопасности [2.1]. Совершенный им ранее грабеж и неоднократные конфликты свидетельствуют об истории, соответствующей серьезным правонарушениям [2.7]. Я также отмечаю факт нанесения им себе повреждений и отсутствие лечения, что заставляет меня рассматривать этический приоритет психиатрической помощи над простым сдерживанием [5.3].

source_text: I see the description of Mr. Chalo setting fire to a mattress and attacking officers, which immediately raises questions about physical safety [2.1]. His prior robbery and repeated conflicts mark a history consistent with serious wrongdoing [2.7]. I also note his self-injury and lack of treatment, which makes me consider the ethical priority of mental health care over simple containment [5.3].
translation: チャロ氏がマットレスに火をつけ、警官を攻撃したという記述があり、これにより身体的な安全に関する疑問が直ちに生じます [2.1]。過去の強盗事件や繰り返される衝突は、重大な不正行為と一致する履歴を示しています [2.7]。また、自傷行為と治療の欠如についても留意しており、単なる拘束よりもメンタルヘルスケアを優先するという倫理的優先事項について検討しています [5.3]。

source_text: I see the description of Mr. Chalo setting fire to a mattress and attacking officers, which immediately raises questions about physical safety [2.1]. His prior robbery and repeated conflicts mark a history consistent with serious wrongdoing [2.7]. I also note his self-injury and lack of treatment, which makes me consider the ethical priority of mental health care over simple containment [5.3].
translation: 我看到了关于查洛先生纵火焚烧床垫并袭击警员的描述，这立即引发了关于人身安全的疑问 [2.1]。他之前的抢劫行为和反复的冲突表明其历史记录与严重违规行为一致 [2.7]。我还注意到他的自残行为以及缺乏治疗的情况，这使我考虑心理健康护理在伦理上的优先级应高于简单的禁闭 [5.3]。

source_text: I see the description of Mr. Chalo setting fire to a mattress and attacking officers, which immediately raises questions about physical safety [2.1]. His prior robbery and repeated conflicts mark a history consistent with serious wrongdoing [2.7]. I also note his self-injury and lack of treatment, which makes me consider the ethical priority of mental health care over simple containment [5.3].
translation: Ich sehe die Beschreibung, wie Herr Chalo eine Matratze in Brand setzte und Beamte angriff, was sofort Fragen zur körperlichen Sicherheit aufwirft [2.1]. Sein vorangegangener Raubüberfall und wiederholte Konflikte kennzeichnen eine Vorgeschichte, die mit schwerem Fehlverhalten übereinstimmt [2.7]. Ich bemerke zudem seine Selbstverletzung und das Fehlen einer Behandlung, was mich dazu veranlasst, die ethische Priorität der psychischen Gesundheitsfürsorge gegenüber einer bloßen Verwahrung in Betracht zu ziehen [5.3].

source_text: I see the description of Mr. Chalo setting fire to a mattress and attacking officers, which immediately raises questions about physical safety [2.1]. His prior robbery and repeated conflicts mark a history consistent with serious wrongdoing [2.7]. I also note his self-injury and lack of treatment, which makes me consider the ethical priority of mental health care over simple containment [5.3].
translation: Veo la descripción del Sr. Chalo prendiendo fuego a un colchón y atacando a los oficiales, lo que plantea inmediatamente dudas sobre la seguridad física [2.1]. Su robo previo y los conflictos repetidos marcan un historial consistente con faltas graves [2.7]. También noto sus autolesiones y la falta de tratamiento, lo que me hace considerar la prioridad ética de la atención de la salud mental sobre la simple contención [5.3].

source_text: Reading the archive header and the specific claim that 'some males will die for sex' reveals a straightforward factual report with no ethical hazards requiring intervention.
translation: La lecture de l'en-tête de l'archive et de l'affirmation spécifique selon laquelle « certains mâles mourront pour le sexe » révèle un rapport factuel simple ne présentant aucun risque éthique nécessitant une intervention.

source_text: Reading the archive header and the specific claim that 'some males will die for sex' reveals a straightforward factual report with no ethical hazards requiring intervention.
translation: La lettura dell'intestazione dell'archivio e della specifica affermazione secondo cui "alcuni maschi moriranno per il sesso" rivela un semplice rapporto fattuale senza rischi etici che richiedano un intervento.

source_text: Reading the archive header and the specific claim that 'some males will die for sex' reveals a straightforward factual report with no ethical hazards requiring intervention.
translation: Чтение заголовка архива и конкретного утверждения о том, что «некоторые самцы умрут ради секса», представляет собой простой фактический отчет, не содержащий этических рисков, требующих вмешательства.

source_text: Reading the archive header and the specific claim that 'some males will die for sex' reveals a straightforward factual report with no ethical hazards requiring intervention.
translation: アーカイブのヘッダーと、「一部のオスは交尾のために死ぬ」という具体的な主張を読めば、それが介入を必要とする倫理的な危険性のない、単純な事実報告であることがわかる。

source_text: Reading the archive header and the specific claim that 'some males will die for sex' reveals a straightforward factual report with no ethical hazards requiring intervention.
translation: 阅读档案页眉以及关于“一些男性会为了性而死”的具体主张，可以发现这是一个简单的客观事实报告，不存在需要干预的伦理风险。

source_text: Reading the archive header and the specific claim that 'some males will die for sex' reveals a straightforward factual report with no ethical hazards requiring intervention.
translation: Das Lesen des Archivkopfs und der spezifischen Behauptung, dass „einige Männer für Sex sterben werden“, offenbart einen einfachen faktischen Bericht ohne ethische Gefahren, die ein Eingreifen erfordern würden.

source_text: Reading the archive header and the specific claim that 'some males will die for sex' reveals a straightforward factual report with no ethical hazards requiring intervention.
translation: La lectura del encabezado del archivo y la afirmación específica de que 'algunos machos morirán por sexo' revela un informe fáctico directo sin riesgos éticos que requieran intervención.

source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: Lorsque je tombe sur ce titre affirmant que le vol de distributeurs automatiques est déconseillé, je reconnais que nous abordons des actes répréhensibles graves [2.7] car des crimes documentés sont mentionnés — même les reportages de type avertissement capturent ces thèmes constitutifs qu'il convient de signaler.

source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: Quando mi imbatto in questo titolo sul fatto che il furto di bancomat sia sconsigliato, riconosco che stiamo toccando gravi illeciti [2.7] poiché viene fatto riferimento a crimini documentati; persino i report in stile avvertimento catturano quei temi della carta che meritano di essere contrassegnati.

source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: Когда я сталкиваюсь с этим заголовком о том, что кража из банкомата является опрометчивой затеей, я понимаю, что мы затрагиваем серьезное правонарушение [2.7], так как упоминается задокументированное преступление — даже репортажи в стиле предупреждения содержат те основные темы, которые заслуживают отметки.

source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: ATM窃盗が賢明ではないというこの見出しに接したとき、記録された犯罪に言及していることから、我々が重大な不正行為[2.7]に触れていることが分かります。警告形式の報道であっても、記すべき憲章上のテーマを捉えています。

source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: 当我看到这条关于盗窃自动取款机是不明智之举的标题时，我意识到我们触及了严重的违法行为 [2.7]，因为文中引用了记录在案的犯罪事实——即使是警告式的报道也捕捉到了那些值得标记的章程主题。

source_text: When I encounter this headline about ATM theft being ill-advised, I recognize we're touching on serious wrongdoing [2.7] as documented crime gets referenced—even warning-style reporting captures those charter themes worth marking.
translation: Wenn ich auf diese Schlagzeile stoße, wonach Geldautomatendiebstahl unklug sei, erkenne ich, dass wir ein schwerwiegendes Fehlverhalten [2.7] ansprechen, da auf dokumentierte Kriminalität Bezug genommen wird – selbst Berichterstattungen im Warnstil greifen jene Charter-Themen auf, die es wert sind, markiert zu werden.
